name: O-6 (SS-67)
events: 2 Nov 1942 USS O-6 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
3 Nov 1942 USS O-6 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
6 Dec 1942 USS O-6 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
7 Dec 1942 USS O-6 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
26 Feb 1943 USS O-6 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
27 Feb 1943 USS O-6 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
28 Mar 1943 USS O-6 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
29 Mar 1943 USS O-6 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
24 Aug 1945 USS O-6 departed New London, Connecticut for the Portsmouth Navy Yard for decommissioning.
25 Aug 1945 USS O-6 arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for decommissioning.
